category_sources: source_facts.description says automatic UML diagram generator for C++ based on Clang; official README describes C++ UML diagram generation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is clang-uml; official GitHub README and documentation site use clang-uml.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README states full documentation is at clang-uml.github.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README list C++ UML generation and PlantUML, Mermaid, GraphML, and JSON outputs.
